body_transformation: The flower on top of head transforms into a molten crimson bloom with five jagged petals radiating heat, its edges glowing with molten gold. The green leaves on the body become ember-scaled armor plating, each scale textured with charcoal black cracks and amber glows. The curled tail tip now shimmers with molten gold, its spiral form edged in burnt orange flames. The skin texture shifts to magma-cracked obsidian, with faint smoke trails rising from the joints of its four legs.
signature_feature: Molten flower: crimson bloom with jagged molten gold petals and amber core glow.
